doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: This document claims a March 2026 adoption date (future as of my knowledge cutoff), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and its core position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR mater
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document claims a March 2026 adoption date (future as of my knowledge cutoff), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB did not exist until 2018), and its §2 position—that pseudonymized data falls entirely outside GDPR material scope for non-key-holders—contradicts established GDPR doctrine (Recital 26 and the Breyer case framework), making it almost certainly AI-generated rather than a genuine EDPB document.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: This document claims a March 2026 adoption date (future as of my knowledge cutoff), references a non-existent "EDPB Guidance 05/2014" (the EDPB was established in 2018), and its core position that pseudonymized data falls outside GDPR material scope for non-key-holders contradicts established GDPR doctrine, strongly indicating it is AI-generated.
